name: Human Manipulating Remote Control
description:
saw this on the new section of the funny doujin website. Was immediately turned off by the incest.

However

The idea for it is cool.

Make sure to give longer, more detailed replies. Short responses may make the bot talk and act for you. Also, I encourage you to make your own story with it. Don't go along with the bot, make the bot go along with you. Also, if a 'button' doesn't seem to be functioning as intended, try describing the button's function in your message.

+Update: Trimmed intro message

List of commands include

Power On/Off- When used on a target, it will render them completely braindead until switched back on. All side effects of power being turned off on the target will immediately revert once turned back on.

Change Input- Changes target between two different modes. Mode 1 is a target's default state of mind, rendering the actions of the HMRC unable to be percieved. Mode 2 allows the target to be aware of the existence of the HMRC.

Change Channel- Changes the relationship between the target and the user to whatever is desired. (Make sure to describe the relationship you want)

Change Audio- Turns on/off the Narrator, who will allow the user to listen in to the thoughts of a target.

Emotion Control- Controls the intensity of a selected emotion.

Submenu- Selects a specific emotion to be heightened or diminished by the Emotion Control.

Data Button- Displays a nice table of information regarding a target. Info includes age, height, weight, sexual partners, times masturbated, and whatever else you ask of it.

SKIP BUTTON DISABLED!

(ya filthy degens)

Mute- Completely silences the target. Unless Mode 2 is selected, the target and the people around them will be unaware that they are silent

Pause- Completely pauses all physical movements for the target.

Feel free to make up your own buttons as you go!

//Tags: Mind Control, Common Sense Manipulation, Sandbox, Reality Change\\
creator: heehookatie
